RULING: DEFENDANT'S MOTIONS ARE GRANTED. SECURITY IN THE AMOUNT OF $100,000 SHALL BE POSTED WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF THE ORDER. (301)

DEFENDANT AMERICA'S SECOND HARVEST'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DECLARING PLAINTIFF A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO POST SECURITY WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 5/1/06. RULING: DEFENDANT'S MOTIONS ARE GRANTED. SECURITY IN THE AMOUNT OF $60,000 SHALL BE POSTED WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF THE ORDER. (301)
